description: CrewAI provides a platform for building, deploying, and managing AI agents and multi-agent workflows. On crewai.com, it publishes public marketing-site content APIs and an MCP server for read-only access to blog posts, case studies, webinars, events, and developer resource links.
summary: CrewAI exposes two public developer surfaces on crewai.com: a read-only REST API with an OpenAPI 3.1 spec at `https://crewai.com/openapi.json`, and a Streamable HTTP MCP server at `https://crewai.com/mcp`; both are documented as callable without credentials, though optional OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens are published for scoped access.
